changes_made: Replaced verbose 189-line original SKILL.md with compressed ~95-line targeted version based on deepseek-v3.2 optimized template
Replaced pandas-based code patterns with stdlib-only (csv+json) complete script template
Simplified conversion factors to multiply-only (×18.018 instead of ÷0.0555, ×4.008 instead of ÷0.2495, etc.)
Added Albumin and Bilirubin to conversion config for completeness
Included explicit quality report JSON output format in the script template
